use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING CYSTINURIA BY ORALLY ADMINISTERING TIOPRONIN WITH FOOD TO PREVENT CYSTINE STONE FORMATION IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS WITH SEVERE HOMOZYGOUS CYSTINURIA
